title: Transformer Block Composition
description: System assembles transformer blocks with MLP, drop-path, and cross-attention for DIT networks
use_cases: Configure block sequence via block_config string (e.g. 'FA-CA-MLP')
Apply full self-attention (FA) with AdaLN modulation
Apply cross-attention (CA) with context embedding and optional mask
Apply MLP feedforward block (FF/MLP) with AdaLN modulation
Apply stochastic depth regularization via DropPath
Apply adaptive layer normalization (AdaLN) with shift/scale/gate from timestep embedding
Inject rotary positional embedding (RoPE) into attention blocks
Process multi-view inputs with n_views parameter
Run forward pass through sequenced blocks

key_classes.name: Block
key_classes.forward: x = x + drop_path(attn(norm1(x))); x = x + drop_path(mlp(norm2(x)))
key_classes.init_params: dim, num_heads, mlp_ratio=4, qkv_bias, drop, attn_drop, drop_path, act_layer, norm_layer, use_flex_attention, use_qk_norm

key_classes.name: CrossAttentionBlock
key_classes.forward: y = norm_y(y); x = x + drop_path(attn(norm1(x), y, y)); x = x + drop_path(mlp(norm2(x)))
key_classes.init_params: dim, num_heads, mlp_ratio=4, qkv_bias, drop, attn_drop, drop_path, act_layer, norm_layer, use_qk_norm

key_classes.name: Mlp
key_classes.forward: x = fc1(x) → act → drop1 → fc2 → drop2
key_classes.init_params: in_features, hidden_features=None, out_features=None, act_layer=GELU, bias=True, drop=0

key_classes.name: DropPath
key_classes.note: Stochastic Depth per-sample regularization; replaced by nn.Identity when drop_prob=0

key_classes.name: DITBuildingBlock
key_classes.adaln: adaLN_modulation → (shift, scale, gate) chunks from emb_B_D; optionally +adaln_lora_B_3D
key_classes.forward: shift/scale/gate = adaLN_modulation(emb_B_D); x = x + gate * block(adaln_norm_state(norm_state, x, scale, shift))
key_classes.init_params: block_type, x_dim, context_dim, num_heads, mlp_ratio, bias, mlp_dropout, qkv_norm_mode, x_format, use_adaln_lora, adaln_lora_dim, n_views

key_classes.name: GeneralDITTransformerBlock
key_classes.description: Wraps ordered sequence of DITBuildingBlocks parsed from block_config string
key_classes.forward_inputs: x, emb_B_D, crossattn_emb, crossattn_mask, rope_emb_L_1_1_D, adaln_lora_B_3D, extra_per_block_pos_emb
key_classes.forward: if extra_pos_emb: x += extra_pos_emb; for block in blocks: x = block(x, emb_B_D, crossattn_emb, ...)
key_classes.init_params: x_dim, context_dim, num_heads, block_config, mlp_ratio, x_format, use_adaln_lora, adaln_lora_dim, n_views

key_classes.name: MultiviewGeneralDIT
key_classes.description: Extends GeneralDIT; reinitializes self.blocks as nn.ModuleDict of GeneralDITTransformerBlock with n_views
key_classes.init_params: max_img_h, max_img_w, max_frames, in_channels, out_channels, patch_spatial, patch_temporal, block_config, model_channels, num_blocks, num_heads, mlp_ratio, n_views, view_condition_dim, ...

key_relationships: GeneralDITTransformerBlock composes DITBuildingBlock (nn.ModuleList, 1 per block_config token)
DITBuildingBlock composes VideoAttn (for FA or CA) or GPT2FeedForward (for MLP)
DITBuildingBlock uses AdaLN modulation (nn.Sequential SiLU + Linear)
Block composes Mlp + DropPath + MemEffAttentionFlash/Flex (simpler standalone variant)
CrossAttentionBlock composes Mlp + DropPath + MemEffCrossAttentionFlash (simpler standalone variant)
DropPath used in both Block and CrossAttentionBlock for stochastic depth
important_notes: Two parallel block hierarchies: (1) Block/CrossAttentionBlock in src/models/utils/attention.py — simpler, used for Lyra-style nets; (2) DITBuildingBlock/GeneralDITTransformerBlock in cosmos_predict1/diffusion/module/blocks.py — config-driven, used for DIT/MultiviewGeneralDIT
AdaLN (adaptive layer normalization) is central: timestep embedding → shift/scale/gate applied around every block operation
DropPath is conditioned on drop_prob: if 0, replaced by nn.Identity (no stochastic depth)
n_views param threads through MultiviewGeneralDIT → GeneralDITTransformerBlock → DITBuildingBlock → VideoAttn for multi-view attention masking
RoPE (rotary position embeddings) injected at attention level via rope_emb_L_1_1_D
Cross-attention block normalizes both query (norm1) and context (norm_y) before attention
